page: Microsoft Azure E8ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Eadv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. This instance features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped from 4 physical cores with multithreading enabled, running at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz. The CPU configuration includes 32 KB of L1 instruction/data cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 32 MB of L3 cache. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Storage is provided via a 472 GB local disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance test places this server in the top tier, which is mirrored by a strong single-core Geekbench score and strong single-threaded bzip3 decompression. Multi-core performance, including stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core, falls within the average range. Memory bandwidth tests show average performance for cached small-block reads and large-block writes, though uncached large-block read bandwidth is relatively weak. Text processing performance is strong, while medium-model LLM prompt processing is weak.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E8ads_v6 offers a dense memory-to-vCPU allocation coupled with local storage, making it a viable option for workloads requiring high memory capacity without the cost of additional compute cores. The presence of a 472 GB local disk and Premium Storage capability supports data-intensive operations. This server is suited for memory-intensive workloads, relational database management systems, caching layers, data analytics, and enterprise applications that benefit from high memory capacity and strong single-thread execution.
description: Microsoft Azure E8ads_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadv6 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs running at 3.7 GHz, 64.0 GB of RAM, and a 472 GB local disk. Benchmarks show top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong single-threaded decompression and text processing, while multi-core performance and memory write bandwidth remain average. Uncached large-block read memory bandwidth is a notable bottleneck, performing in the lower quartile. With an 8.0 GB per vCPU memory allocation and Premium Storage capability, this instance provides a balanced profile for memory-heavy applications. It is suited for relational databases, in-memory caching, data analytics, and workloads requiring high memory capacity relative to compute resources.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E8ads_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 8 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and a 472 GB local disk. It delivers top-tier single-core performance for databases and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E8ads_v6 is an 8-vCPU memory-optimized virtual machine with 64 GB RAM, a 472 GB local disk, and an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high single-core performance, dedicated AMD EPYC processing, and integrated local storage for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz
Equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM and 472 GB of local storage
Top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong text processing
Premium Storage capable for flexible disk configurations
Suited for relational databases, caching layers, and memory-intensive applications
